name: git-branch-is
description: Assert that the name of the current branch of a git repository has a particular value.
author: Kevin Locke <kevin@kevinlocke.name>
//: All scripts should run in POSIX sh and Windows cmd.exe

scripts.doc: npm run doc-js && npm run doc-spec
scripts.doc-spec: rimraf doc/spec && mkdir doc/spec && mocha --reporter doc --recursive test | nodecat doc-src/spec/header.xhtml - doc-src/spec/footer.xhtml > doc/spec/index.xhtml
scripts.lint: npm run lint-js && npm run lint-doc
scripts.lint-doc: jsdoc -t templates/silent -c jsdoc-lint.conf.json . && echo JSDoc passed.
scripts.release: git -C doc push && git push --follow-tags origin main gh-pages && echo "Create a GitHub Release (from CHANGELOG.md) to run publish workflow."
scripts.postversion: rimraf doc && git clone -b gh-pages -l -q . doc && npm run doc && git -C doc add . && git -C doc commit -n -m "Docs for v$npm_package_version"
scripts.preversion: npm run test-cov && c8 check-coverage --statements 95 && depcheck --ignore-dirs doc --ignores="eslint-*,rimraf" && david && node ./bin/git-branch-is.js main && hub-ci-status -vv --wait
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test-unit
scripts.test-cov: npm run lint && npm run test-unit-cov
scripts.version: npm run changelog && echo && echo === Please edit CHANGELOG.md as desired, then exit === && echo && "${npm_config_shell:-${SHELL:-bash}}" && git commit -m "Update CHANGELOG.md for $npm_package_version" CHANGELOG.md
scripts.version-deps: npm install conventional-changelog-cli david depcheck git-branch-is hub-ci-status

david.// eslint: Must match version from peerDependencies of @kevinoid/eslint-plugin
